What could be the possible causes of toothache?

Toothache can be caused by a variety of issues, including tooth decay, gum disease, a cracked tooth, an exposed tooth root, a jaw joint disorder, or sinusitis. Other causes might include a tooth abscess, wisdom teeth coming in, or an injury to the tooth. Poor oral hygiene and dietary habits can also contribute to the development of toothache. If you are experiencing a toothache, it's important to consult a dentist to determine the exact cause and receive appropriate treatment.
